jobText:
About the Role

We are hiring a Business Operations Analyst to support internal reporting, process improvement, and cross-functional coordination across our operations team.

This is a full-time, in-person role based in Austin, TX.

Key Responsibilities

- Build and maintain weekly and monthly performance reports using Excel
- Analyze operational data to identify trends, issues, and opportunities for improvement
- Create dashboards and summaries for leadership using Excel and PowerPoint
- Coordinate with cross-functional teams including sales, operations, and finance to gather data and align on priorities
- Document workflows and recommend process improvements to increase efficiency
- Support ad hoc analysis and reporting requests from leadership

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree required
- Strong proficiency in Excel (pivot tables, basic formulas, data organization)
- Experience creating reports or dashboards
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Ability to communicate findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders
- Organized and able to manage multiple priorities

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in an operations, analytics, or business analyst role (internship or full-time)
- Familiarity with PowerPoint for presenting findings
- Experience working with cross-functional teams

Additional Details

- This is not a sales role
- This is not a clinical or healthcare role
- This role is focused on internal operations and analytics
